mapper.sql: id, parent_id, process_def_id, business_key, state, priority, variable, end_time, creator, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into wf_historic_process_instance (id, parent_id, process_def_id, business_key, state, priority, variable, end_time, creator, create_time) values (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{businessKey}, #{state}, #{priority}, #{variable}, #{endTime}, #{creator}, #{createTime})
